label: Task vectors & parameter arithmetic

node.label: Task vectors & parameter arithmetic
node.definition: Task arithmetic treats fine-tuning deltas as vectors that can be added, subtracted, scaled, projected, or composed to modify model behavior.
node.why_it_matters: It provides a concrete algebra for comparing and combining learned adaptations.
limitations: Weight-space directions are not perfectly linear or independent, so composition can produce destructive interference.

dependencies.rationale: Task vectors & parameter arithmetic uses Model merging & weight-space composition as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Task vectors & parameter arithmetic uses Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Task vectors & parameter arithmetic uses Linear algebra as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Task arithmetic treats fine-tuning deltas as vectors that can be added, subtracted, scaled, projected, or composed to modify model behavior.
It provides a concrete algebra for comparing and combining learned adaptations.
Weight-space directions are not perfectly linear or independent, so composition can produce destructive interference.
